title: dryopteris loheriana
intro: Dryopteris loheriana, also known as Loher's wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Dryopteris loheriana is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
